name: youkong-living-room
description: 有空客厅官网与活动系统 MVP

scripts.test: npm run test:syntax && npm run test:smoke
scripts.test:syntax: node --check app.js assets/js/rich-editor.js assets/js/activity-share.js lib/app.js lib/store.js lib/rich-text.js lib/routes/logs.js theme.js script.js server.js scripts/build-static.js scripts/build-function.js scripts/backup-data.js scripts/verify-cloudbase-package.js scripts/visual-snapshots.js
scripts.build:cloudbase: npm run build:static && npm run build:function
scripts.deploy:static: npm run build:static && tcb hosting deploy dist -e youkong-d5gh4x0ayc29a2187
scripts.deploy:function: npm run build:function && tcb fn deploy youkongApi --path /api --force
scripts.deploy:cloudbase: npm run build:cloudbase && tcb hosting deploy dist -e youkong-d5gh4x0ayc29a2187 && tcb fn deploy youkongApi --path /api --force
